objective: Make structured agent cycle plan validation fail with structured `FAIL` output instead of a traceback when a plan JSON file is malformed.
scope_boundary: Patch `scripts/overlord/validate_structured_agent_cycle_plan.py` to catch malformed JSON and file read errors.
Add regression tests for malformed JSON in both full scan and governance-surface matching paths.
Add issue-backed PDCAR, execution-scope, validation, and closeout artifacts.
Run focused tests, e2e malformed-plan proof, execution-scope validation, and Local CI Gate.
out_of_scope: Closing the broader Codex-spark refinement pass issue #177.
research_summary: Issue #192 identifies that the validator calls `json.loads(path.read_text(...))` without handling parse or read failures. The same unsafe loader is used when resolving issue-specific matching plans for governance-surface changes, so a malformed plan can crash before the validator reaches its structured failure reporting. The minimal fix is a safe loader shared by both call sites.

sprints.name: Safe JSON Load
sprints.goal: Convert malformed structured-plan JSON into structured validator failures.
tasks: Add a safe JSON loader that catches `json.JSONDecodeError` and `OSError`.
Use repo-relative display paths for parse failures when possible.
Skip semantic validation when a payload cannot be parsed.
acceptance_criteria: Malformed JSON produces `FAIL <path>: could not parse JSON: ...`.
The validator exits 1 instead of emitting a traceback.

sprints.name: Regression Coverage
sprints.goal: Prove both unsafe load paths are covered.
tasks: Add a test for malformed JSON during full repo plan validation.
Add a test for malformed JSON during governance-surface matching-plan lookup.
Keep the existing valid-plan and governance-surface tests passing.
acceptance_criteria: Malformed full-scan plan test fails cleanly with no traceback.
Malformed matching-plan test fails cleanly with no traceback.

sprints.name: Governance Evidence
sprints.goal: Record the issue-backed implementation and final e2e proof.
tasks: Add PDCAR and structured plan artifacts.
Add implementation execution-scope and same-family exception evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Execution-scope assertion passes for the changed-file set.

specialist_reviews.focus: Locate unsafe JSON-loading paths and define the narrow regression scope.
specialist_reviews.summary: Both full plan scanning and issue-specific matching-plan lookup need the safe loader; the fix can stay local to the validator and tests.

alternate_model_review.summary: This is a narrow validator bugfix, not an architecture or standards change requiring Tier 1 alternate-family review. A read-only implementation review is planned before PR closeout.
evidence: STANDARDS.md Society of Minds cross-review scope

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement issue #192 only: structured JSON parse failure handling, regression tests, governance artifacts, validation evidence, and tracker updates.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused tests and e2e malformed JSON proof, request read-only review, then open a PR.

material_deviation_rules: If schema changes appear necessary, stop and split into a separate issue.
If governance-surface matching semantics need more than parse-error handling, record a follow-up instead of expanding this bugfix.
If Local CI Gate fails outside the changed scope, record the failure and do not mask it with unrelated edits.
If downstream repos need changes, create a separate issue-backed rollout slice.
